use_cases: Portfolio or creative work showcase with interactive image expansion
Product gallery display for e-commerce with hover preview
Visual content presentation for media and publishing websites
Team or project showcase section for SaaS landing pages
Photo collection display for photography or design portfolios
ai_summary: A horizontal image gallery with expandable hover interaction where images smoothly grow to fill available space when hovered. Features Unsplash photography, clean typography with Poppins font, and a minimalist dark header section. The accordion-style expansion creates an engaging visual browsing experience suitable for showcasing creative work, products, or visual collections.
